title: Beldray LA034009FEU7 Deep Clean 2 in 1 Sweeping Brush – Built-In Squeegee, Durable Non-Scratch Bristles, Extendable Handle, Rubber Bumper to Protect Skirting Boards, For Textured Floors, Tiles & Grout
features: Ideal for precision cleaning, this Beldray Deep Clean 2 in 1 Floor Scrubbing Brush is designed to tackle stubborn dirt and debris.
Equipped with a built-in squeegee, this multipurpose sweeping brush is great for gathering and removing excess liquids and fine dust.
Thanks to the extendable handle and narrow head, you can easily clean in corners and under furniture without bending or straining.
Crafted with a rubber bumper, you can sweep up with peace of mind that your walls and surfaces will be protected from scratches.
Deep Clean: The Beldray Deep Clean range offers a variety of cleaning tools for ultimate precision to keep your home clean and fresh.
Parts of this product are made from synthetic rubber
description: From the brand Previous page For busy lives & messy homes! We’ve developed a range of products across 4 key categories, focussed on making every area of your home easier to look after. Across electrical, garment care, cleaning and bathroom, Beldray products are designed to make everyday chores feel less of a chore. Let's make memories, not mess! From Bradley to Beldray… A family brand from the beginning! Founded in 1872, as Walter Bradley watched his sons playing with their alphabet bricks, the boys attempted to spell the Bradley family name, and instead stumbled upon the word Beldray. A household brand was born! Inventors of the first height-adjustable ironing board From the Supreme and Universal boards of the 1960s and 1970s to the Comfort and Overdoor boards of the 2020s, we are experts in creating high-quality boards to suit every home. For generations, families have trusted Beldray with their ironing. Next page
